column1: # Ground-truth labels for YOK002 (unused dependency) / YOK003 (missing
# dependency) findings on the §17 OSS validation set.
# Tab-separated columns (lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored):
#   distribution  distribution name reported in the finding
#                   fp = false positive (the dependency is in fact used /
#                   tp = true positive (genuinely unused / genuinely missing)
#   note          short justification (how it was verified)
# scripts/oss-metrics.sh matches findings on (slug, code, distribution).
# Any finding not listed here is counted `unknown`, which blocks the FP gate
# until classified. Populate this file after the first metrics run.

column1: # These are genuinely-unused dependencies that yokei MUST keep flagging. They
# give the recall gate true positives so over-suppression (reporting nothing)
# fails the run instead of passing trivially.

column5: recall sentinel: declared runtime dep with no import anywhere; must stay detected
recall sentinel: unused runtime dep coexisting with a correctly-suppressed optional import — guards 4.C against over-suppression
